privileged_info_summary: The task involves configuring mailbox permissions in a FreeScout email management system. A 'Field Service' mailbox must be configured to grant access to Sarah Chen (tech_sarah@helpdesk.local), a senior technician who was promoted, while ensuring Marcus Rivera (tech_marcus@helpdesk.local), a junior technician reassigned to warehouse operations, is denied access. The admin credentials are: email admin@helpdesk.local with password Admin123!.
